ddls:
CREATE TABLE "storage_units" (
  "vhtid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the storage unit */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the storage unit */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the storage unit */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the storage unit */,
  "vhtposition" INTEGER /* Position of the storage unit within the warehouse */,
  "vbybayid" INTEGER /* Identifier for the bay where the storage unit is located */,
  "vtrtierno" INTEGER /* Tier number within the warehouse */,
  "vtrtierseq" INTEGER /* Sequence number within the tier */,
  "vbwrowno" INTEGER /* Row number within the bay */,
  "vbwrowseq" INTEGER /* Sequence number within the row */,
  "vlcvwcid" INTEGER /* Identifier for the vertical lift module */,
  "cabposition" INTEGER /* Position of the storage unit within the cabinet */,
  "max_weight_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum weight capacity of the storage unit */,
  "is_occupied" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the storage unit is currently occupied */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the storage unit */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the last inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status (e.g., required, not required) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vhtid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_units_vbybayid FOREIGN KEY ("vbybayid") REFERENCES bays ("vbybayid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_units_vbwrowno FOREIGN KEY ("vbwrowno") REFERENCES rows ("vbwrowno"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_units_cabposition FOREIGN KEY ("cabposition") REFERENCES cabinets ("cabposition"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_units_vlcvwcid FOREIGN KEY ("vlcvwcid") REFERENCES vertical_lift_modules ("vlcvwcid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_units_vtrtierno FOREIGN KEY ("vtrtierno") REFERENCES tiers ("vtrtierno")
)

CREATE TABLE "bays" (
  "vbybayid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bay */,
  "bay_name" TEXT /* Name of the bay */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the bay within the warehouse */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of storage units the bay can hold */,
  "current_capacity" INTEGER /* Current number of occupied storage units in the bay */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the bay */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the last inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status (e.g., required, not required) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vbybayid")
)

CREATE TABLE "tiers" (
  "vtrtierno" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tier */,
  "tier_name" TEXT /* Name of the tier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tier */,
  "max_height" INTEGER /* Maximum height of the tier */,
  "max_weight_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum weight capacity of the tier */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the tier */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the last inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status (e.g., required, not required) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vtrtierno")
)

CREATE TABLE "rows" (
  "vbwrowno" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each row */,
  "row_name" TEXT /* Name of the row */,
  "vbybayid" INTEGER /* Reference to the bay where the row is located */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of storage units the row can hold */,
  "current_capacity" INTEGER /* Current number of occupied storage units in the row */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the row */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the last inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status (e.g., required, not required) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vbwrowno")
)

CREATE TABLE "vertical_lift_modules" (
  "vlcvwcid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vertical lift module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the module (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of storage units the module can handle */,
  "current_capacity" INTEGER /* Current number of storage units being handled by the module */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the module */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the last inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status (e.g., required, not required) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vlcvwcid")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabinets" (
  "cabposition" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabinet */,
  "cabinet_name" TEXT /* Name of the cabinet */,
  "vbybayid" INTEGER /* Reference to the bay where the cabinet is located */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of storage units the cabinet can hold */,
  "current_capacity" INTEGER /* Current number of occupied storage units in the cabinet */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the cabinet */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the last inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status (e.g., required, not required) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabposition")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the inventory item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the inventory item */,
  "item_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the inventory item */,
  "item_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the inventory item */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the inventory item (e.g., electronics, clothing) */,
  "item_supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the inventory item */,
  "vhtid" INTEGER /* Reference to the storage unit where the item is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the item (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check for the item */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item to prevent stockouts */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the stock falls below the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_items_vhtid FOREIGN KEY ("vhtid") REFERENCES storage_units ("vhtid")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., warehouse staff, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vhtid" INTEGER /* ID of the storage unit being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the storage unit */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item accessed */,
  "quantity_accessed" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the storage unit was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., retrieval, restocking) */,
  "reason_for_access" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the storage unit (e.g., order fulfillment, inventory check) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vhtid FOREIGN KEY ("vhtid") REFERENCES storage_units ("vhtid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
